title: Paraprasophyllum basalticum
taxonomy: Paraprasophyllum basalticum is a species of orchid native to Australia. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Within the Orchidaceae family, Paraprasophyllum basalticum can be classified as part of the subfamily Orchidoideae and the tribe Cranichideae. The species is further classified into the genus Paraprasophyllum and is sometimes grouped with the genus Prasophyllum. The classification of Paraprasophyllum basalticum reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
